page_metadata.biotools__summary: SIRW is a web interface to SIR (Simple Indexing and Retrieval System). It combines the ability to search protein/nucleotide databases with keywords and a sequence motif.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SIRW is a web interface to SIR (Simple Indexing and Retrieval System). It combines the ability to search protein/nucleotide databases with keywords and a sequence motif.
